about.title: About Me
description: A Front-end Engineer and Vue specialist with 8+ years of experience building web apps with cutting-edge technologies like Nuxt, Typescript, GraphQL, Tailwind CSS and more.
Strongly experienced in e-commerce environment, I've already worked with different platforms like Magento 1 and 2, Commercetools, Prestashop, SAP Commerce, Oracle Commerce Cloud and Vtex.
Currently based in São Paulo/ Brasil, with proficient English communication and writing. I'm open and willing to relocate - traveling and connecting to new cultures and people is my major passion.
I love Open Source projects and working with fast-paced teams. Curious and creative people are what inspire me the most.

experiences.name: Pasquali Solution - Front-End Engineer
experiences.location: São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil - Remote

experiences.name: Vue Storefront - Front-End Engineer
experiences.location: São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil - Remote
experiences.description:
As a Front-End Engineer at Vue Storefront from July 2021 to June 2022 (remote in Wrocław, Poland), I implemented the Click and Collect feature on Vue Storefront using custom Commercetools APIs (link). I was responsible for the entire process of conceptualization, planning, and development, utilizing JavaScript, TypeScript, Vue, Nuxt, and Vuex.

I also worked on the Commercetools integration (link), establishing patterns and principles for all future company integrations to ensure high quality, efficiency, and excellent user experience.

experiences.name: Kovi - Front-End Engineer
experiences.description:
As a Front-End Engineer at Kovi, I worked on the Kovi Signup project (cadastro.kovi.com.br), aiming to simplify the vehicle rental registration process. We used JavaScript, TypeScript, Vue.js, Nuxt, Vuex, and GraphQL in a Headless architecture hosted on AWS, focusing on user experience with intuitive interfaces and efficient workflows.

I also developed the Kovi Design System to support all of Kovi's front-end applications, including components used by the Mobile team. Built using the latest industry technologies, we started with Vue-Demi to migrate from Vue2 to Vue3 and used decorators to create a complex and functional Design System.

experiences.name: Corebiz - Front-End Developer
experiences.location: São Paulo e Região, Brasil - Hybrid
experiences.description: As a Front-End Developer at CoreBiz, I participated in the full refactoring of the UI/UX of Hering's e-commerce frontend applications (hering.com.br and dzarm.com.br). Using SAP Commerce as the backend in a multistore implementation, the refactoring was aimed at all their sub-stores.

experiences.name: Enext Consulting - Front-End Developer
experiences.description:
As a Front-End Developer at Enext Consultoria, I participated in migrating the backend of Osklen's e-commerce (osklen.com.br) from Vtex to Oracle Commerce Cloud.

I also completed my first production implementation using the Nuxt.js framework on the OnStores Marketplace project, the first marketplace in Brazil for digital services specialized in shopping centers, serving as a showcase for products from physical and online stores.

experiences.name: Webstore Virtual Stores - Front-End Developer
experiences.location: São Paulo e Região, Brasil - On-site
experiences.description: At Webstore Lojas Virtuais, a pioneering SaaS e-commerce platform, I served as the lead Front-End developer. I achieved a significant milestone by developing reliable, stable software that serves over 1 million users daily. I planned and built a JAM Stack system that replaced the old layout system, delivering an asynchronous, scalable, and highly reliable application view.

experiences.name: Creative House Agency - Full Stack Web Developer (PHP)
experiences.description: At the advertising and propaganda agency Creative House, I was responsible for developing the company's web products, directly involved in researching and developing technologies that best met client demands.

experiences.name: Estudio86 - Full Stack Web Developer (PHP)
experiences.location: São Paulo e Região, Brasil - On-site
experiences.description: An advertising agency located in Guarulhos city, Estudio86 serves clients from various sectors. In this experience, I worked on developing responsive and adaptive web pages, as well as developing and maintaining online stores.
